about.title: Discover our paradise
about.description: Nestled on a secret island with crystal-clear waters, Ilot Coco Beach offers a unique experience between sky and sea. Handcrafted wooden cabins, hammocks suspended over turquoise water, and a bohemian atmosphere that takes you far from everyday life.

features.cabinsDesc: Private spaces above the crystal-clear water
features.hammocksDesc: Swings and hammocks between sand and sea
